content:
Hi everyone, we wanted to let you all know of a great community project that is currently in the work and what you can do to help it grow!
For the past few weeks, we’ve been hard at work on the **Boss Compendium Project**, a community effort to catalogue every move of each boss so everyone can benefit from it.
A lot has been accomplished already, but there’s still plenty left to do, and that’s where we need your help!
We’re looking for volunteers who are interested in helping to gather information on the remaining bosses. 
This task doesn’t require special skills,  just time, patience, and dedication.
We’re also looking for people who’d like to contribute on the **graphic side of the project**. 
Using the free and simple tool **Canva**, you can help create the visual Boss Pages using our ready-made templates, like the draft we want to share so you can see what they’ll look like (free to give your opinion on it to make it even better).
If you’d like to contribute to this project, please **feel free to reach out to me**.
A huge thank you to everyone who’s already helping make this happen <:cute1:1356053053568192717>
